claims.text: The baseline source enrichment success rate is 27% on the saved 30-item fixture.
Korean-language items form the largest identifiable failure cluster.
A Korean-language fallback should improve enrichment success rate to at least 50%.

review_layers.text: The paper claims improvement to 50% but does not run the fallback.
evidence: Paper states that no post-fallback run has been executed yet.
review_layers.hidden_assumption: The saved fixture can evaluate the proposed fallback.
review_layers.next_action: Run or dry-run the fallback on the 30-item fixture.

review_layers.text: The paper may overfit to a single 30-item fixture.
evidence: Paper uses one 30-item fixture; generalization is not tested.
review_layers.hidden_assumption: A second fixture or split would reveal generalization risk.
review_layers.next_action: Add a second fixture only after the first fallback run passes.

review_layers.text: The paper ignores image classification performance, which could affect the conclusion.
evidence: Review request is outside the paper's stated research claim or scope.
review_layers.hidden_assumption: Reviewer imported a requirement from a different task.
review_layers.next_action: Ignore for this loop unless the paper adds image inputs.

selected_experiment.hypothesis: Run or dry-run the fallback on the 30-item fixture
selected_experiment.keep_condition: measurable improvement or direct support for the target claim
selected_experiment.discard_condition: no measurable support or new regression evidence
selected_experiment.verify: Run or dry-run the fallback on the 30-item fixture.
